code:
type WithdrawError =
  | Overdraft

value BankAccount
  balance: Int
end

fn deposit(_ account: BankAccount, _ amount: Int) -> BankAccount
  account.copy(balance: account.balance + amount)
end

fn withdraw(_ account: BankAccount, _ amount: Int) -> Result<BankAccount, WithdrawError>
  if amount > account.balance
    Err(WithdrawError.Overdraft)
  else
    Ok(account.copy(balance: account.balance - amount))
  end
end

mut account = BankAccount(balance: 100)
mut last_status = "ok"

account = deposit(account, 50)

match withdraw(account, 30)
when Ok(new_account)
  account = new_account
  last_status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last_status = "overdraft"
end

match withdraw(account, 500)
when Ok(new_account)
  account = new_account
  last_status = "ok"
when Err(_)
  last_status = "overdraft"
end

print("final_balance=#{account.balance}")
print("last_status=#{last_status}")
